title: Bhakt Gora Kumbhar
desc: Parma starts acting crazy like Sarju. It makes Gora, Devi and Shura afraid. Why is Parma behaving like this?

title: Dharti No Chhedo Ghar
desc: A middle-class father works hard to settle his two diligent sons and narcissistic daughter. However, when his daughter returns after marriage, tensions rise.

title: Moti Na Chowkre Sapna Man Ditha
desc: A woman works hard to support her family and longs to find someone she can be with. However, things worsen when she falls in love with a man only to learn he loves her sister.

title: Timli
desc: When Thakur Chandraban's son, Chandan, and Timli, his servant's daughter, fall deeply in love with each other, he agrees to go to great extents for their relationship.

title: Desi Beats
desc: A comprehensive compilation of acclaimed chart-topping Indian songs, composed by diverse artists, is played in succession.

title: Back Bencher
desc: Gopal, a slow learner, is pressured by his mother to keep up with his fellow students. Finally, he breaks down and runs away from his home after he is unable to cope with failing.

title: Desi Beats
desc: A comprehensive compilation of acclaimed chart-topping Indian songs, composed by diverse artists, is played in succession.

title: Ooncha Khordani Khandani
desc: Kishan, Thakur's devoted servant, goes to jail for a murder he has not committed. His release from prison, 15 years later, throws light on the truth.

title: Dikri Dolariya Desh Ni
desc: While staying in the United States, Sita loses her parents in a car accident. Her life takes a turn when she comes to India to convey the news to her grandparents.

title: Mindhol Chhutiya Mandve
desc: Childhood lovers Jai and Hiral reunite as adults and wish to get married. However, they must overcome every obstacle in their path.
